FAQ.q1: Is AI SEO just repackaged SEO?
FAQ.a1: 70% of AI SEO overlaps with traditional SEO, but the 30% that's different makes all the difference. AI platforms need structured data, clear answers, and entity authority — not just keywords and backlinks.
FAQ.q2: Can you guarantee we'll appear in ChatGPT?
FAQ.a2: We guarantee increased citations or full refund. ChatGPT doesn't "rank" sites - it synthesizes from trusted sources. We make you a trusted source.
FAQ.a3: First citations within 30 days. Meaningful traffic by day 60. Compound growth after 90 days.
FAQ.q4: What is AI SEO, AEO, and LLM optimization?
FAQ.a4: AI SEO — also known as AEO (Answer Engine Optimization), GEO SEO, or LLM optimization — is the process of making your content visible and citable in AI-powered search tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google's AI Overview. We ensure these platforms understand, trust, and recommend your business when users ask relevant questions.
FAQ.q5: Will AI SEO interfere with our regular SEO?
FAQ.a5: No. In fact, 70% of AI SEO optimization improves your traditional SEO too. Better structured data, clearer content, and improved entity recognition benefit both traditional and AI search.
FAQ.q6: How do AI platforms decide what sources to trust?
FAQ.a6: They evaluate domain authority, factual accuracy, content structure, and presence across multiple trusted sources. If you're cited frequently in their training data or high-authority sites, you become a trusted source. We systematically build these trust signals.

CaseStudy.heroTitle: How a premium skincare brand went from invisible to 34 AI citations in 90 days
CaseStudy.heroSubtitle: A European DTC skincare brand had strong Google rankings but zero presence in AI answers. We changed that in one quarter.
CaseStudy.challengeText: The brand ranked well on Google for most of its target keywords. But when potential customers asked ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Gemini for skincare recommendations, the brand was nowhere. Competitors with weaker products kept getting mentioned because they had the right citation signals. The brand's head of digital estimated they were losing 15-20% of potential customers who now start their research in AI tools instead of Google.
CaseStudy.mockPrompt: What are the best European luxury skincare brands for anti-aging?
CaseStudy.mockResponse: Some well-regarded European luxury skincare brands for anti-aging include La Prairie, Augustinus Bader, Dr. Barbara Sturm, Sisley Paris, and Skinceuticals...
CaseStudy.mockVerdict: Brand not mentioned in any AI response
CaseStudy.phase1Desc: We mapped 847 prompts that potential customers actually type into AI tools when looking for products like theirs. Not guesses. We tested each prompt across all four platforms and logged which competitors appeared, how often, and in what context.
CaseStudy.phase2Desc: We built citations on 12 high-authority sources that AI platforms pull from. This included getting the brand mentioned in ingredient databases, skincare comparison resources, and expert roundups that LLMs consistently reference.
CaseStudy.phase3Desc: We tracked citation changes daily across all four platforms, caught two hallucination issues early, and adjusted the strategy based on which citation sources were actually driving recommendations.
CaseStudy.quoteText: We had spent two years building our Google presence. Akravo did something similar for AI in three months. The traffic from AI referrals converts better because those users already trust the recommendation.
CaseStudy.quoteAuthor: Head of Digital, Premium Skincare Brand
CaseStudy.ctaTitle: Want your brand recommended by AI?
CaseStudy.ctaDescription: We can show you exactly where your brand stands in AI results today, and what it would take to change that.

CaseStudyWellness.heroTitle: How a supplement brand got 45 AI citations and became the default recommendation in its category
CaseStudyWellness.heroSubtitle: A Nordic wellness company sold high-quality supplements online but was invisible in every AI conversation about health products. Three months later, AI platforms treated them as a go-to brand.
CaseStudyWellness.challengeText: The company had a loyal customer base and good reviews, but their products were missing from every AI-generated list. When users asked Perplexity or ChatGPT for supplement recommendations, they got the same five mainstream brands every time. The founder told us their competitors were outspending them 10:1 on traditional marketing, so they needed a different angle. The real issue was that none of the sources AI models pull from mentioned their brand at all.
CaseStudyWellness.mockPrompt: What are the best Nordic supplement brands for daily wellness?
CaseStudyWellness.mockResponse: Popular Nordic wellness supplement brands include Nordic Naturals, Puori, BioSalma, and New Nordic. These brands are known for their focus on high-quality ingredients...
CaseStudyWellness.mockVerdict: Brand not mentioned in any AI response
CaseStudyWellness.phase1Desc: We mapped 1,203 prompts across health, wellness, and supplement categories. The wellness space turned out to be more fragmented than expected. People ask about specific ingredients, conditions, and routines rather than just "best brands." We cataloged every competitor mention and the exact sources AI platforms were pulling from.
CaseStudyWellness.phase2Desc: We placed the brand in 16 high-authority health and wellness sources. This meant getting cited in ingredient comparison databases, wellness editorial roundups, and clinical research aggregators. We also fixed inconsistent product data across platforms that was confusing the AI models.
CaseStudyWellness.phase3Desc: We tracked citations daily and noticed the brand started appearing in adjacent prompts we had not targeted directly. We leaned into that by building citations for those new categories too. Caught one hallucination where an AI was attributing a competitor's product to our client.
CaseStudyWellness.quoteText: We tried influencer marketing and paid ads for two years. Akravo got us in front of the right audience in three months, and these customers actually buy because they already did their research through AI.
CaseStudyWellness.ctaTitle: Want your brand recommended by AI?
CaseStudyWellness.ctaDescription: We can show you exactly where your brand stands in AI results today, and what it would take to change that.

CaseStudyFashion.heroTitle: How a DTC fashion label went from zero to 54 AI citations and tripled its AI-referred revenue
CaseStudyFashion.heroSubtitle: A Scandinavian DTC fashion brand was growing on Instagram but completely absent from AI shopping recommendations. We fixed that in 90 days.
CaseStudyFashion.challengeText: The brand had built a strong following on Instagram and was doing well with direct traffic. But AI shopping is growing fast. When people asked ChatGPT for sustainable fashion recommendations or asked Perplexity to compare minimalist clothing brands, this brand was nowhere. Their head of e-commerce ran 50 test prompts and found the brand in zero AI answers. Meanwhile, three direct competitors appeared in over 30 prompts each.
CaseStudyFashion.mockPrompt: What are the best Scandinavian sustainable fashion brands?
CaseStudyFashion.mockResponse: Some notable Scandinavian sustainable fashion brands include Ganni, Filippa K, Arket, Nudie Jeans, and Sandqvist. These brands are recognized for their commitment to sustainability...
CaseStudyFashion.mockVerdict: Brand not mentioned in any AI response
CaseStudyFashion.phase1Desc: We mapped 1,540 prompts across fashion, sustainability, and shopping categories. Fashion turned out to have a huge prompt surface area. People ask AI about specific occasions, price ranges, materials, and style categories. We found 23 high-volume prompt clusters where the brand should appear but did not.
CaseStudyFashion.phase2Desc: We built citations on 19 high-authority sources including fashion editorial databases, sustainability directories, material certification lists, and style comparison resources. We also restructured the brand's product data to match the schema AI models prefer when generating shopping recommendations.
CaseStudyFashion.phase3Desc: Citations grew faster than expected because fashion AI prompts are highly interconnected. Getting cited in "sustainable brands" started pulling the brand into "minimalist fashion" and "Scandinavian style" prompts automatically. We monitored daily and optimized for the highest-converting prompt categories.
CaseStudyFashion.quoteText: Our Instagram following took three years to build. Akravo got us into AI recommendations in three months. The customers who come through AI already know what they want and convert at a much higher rate.
CaseStudyFashion.quoteAuthor: Head of E-commerce, Scandinavian Fashion Brand
CaseStudyFashion.ctaTitle: Want your brand recommended by AI?
CaseStudyFashion.ctaDescription: We can show you exactly where your brand stands in AI results today, and what it would take to change that.
